stemHtml: A pilot needed to extract a tooth and the dentist used local anaesthesia. One hour after the application of anaesthesia, the pilot is asked by the company to fly. Is that possible?

options.a: No, the pilot may not fly 24 hours after local anaesthesia, after that period he/she must decide if he/she is fit to fly.
options.b: No, the pilot needs to seek medical advice before flying.
options.c: Yes, the pilot can fly straight away.
options.d: Yes, as long as the other pilot is under 60 years old.
